audit_items.proof_trace: The code at L793-795 correctly implements `startMult - (startMult - endMult) * elapsed / duration` using `mulDiv` (rounds down), ensuring no underflow. Preconditions enforce `endMult <= startMult` (L653), `auctionDuration != 0` (L647), and `elapsedTime` is clamped to `auctionDuration` (L785), so the decay is always linear and bounded between `endMult` and `startMult`.
